title: fragaria virginiana var. grayana
intro: Fragaria virginiana var. grayana, also known as the Virginia strawberry or Gray's strawberry, is a perennial plant species belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can aid in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Fragaria virginiana var. grayana include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to soothe digestive issues and promote overall well-being.
